DALL-E and Runway are both popular tools in the AI Image Generators space. Here's how they compare.

DALL-ERunway
MakerOpenAIRunway AI
PricingIncluded with ChatGPT Plus ($20/mo); limited free use in ChatGPTFree plan available (limited credits); paid plans from $12/mo
Free tierYesYes
Best forUsers who already use ChatGPT and want inline image generation.Creators and studios needing professional AI video generation.
